name: Ensure encryption keys are not expiring within the next 14 days
description: Encryption keys that are configured to expire within the next 14 days.
body:
### Overview

This control identifies cases where an encryption key expires within the next 14 days. Expiring keys can interrupt decryption, signing, or application startup flows that depend on the key.

The remediation is to rotate, renew, or extend the key before the expiration window is reached.
remediationDescription:
## Remediation

Rotate, renew, or extend the affected key before it enters the expiration window that the control evaluates. Validate dependent services before disabling any old key material.

### AWS

This control identifies AWS keys when imported key material or provider metadata indicates that the key will expire within 14 days.

1. Open **AWS KMS > Customer managed keys** and select the affected key.
2. Check whether the key uses imported key material and confirm the expiration date.
3. If the key is still required, reimport key material before expiration or migrate the workload to a new customer-managed key.
4. Update dependent services to use the new key if you choose replacement instead of reimport.
5. Keep the old key enabled until all encrypted data can be decrypted with the replacement path.
6. Re-run Cyscale sync and assessment.

CLI review command:

```bash
aws kms describe-key --key-id {{asset.idFromProvider}} --region {{asset.region}}
```

Reference: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kms/latest/developerguide/importing-keys.html

The control is satisfied when the key is no longer reported as expiring within the next 14 days.

### GCP

Google Cloud KMS keys generally rotate by version. For keys approaching an operational expiration or retirement date, create or promote a new key version and make it primary.

1. Open **Security > Key Management** and select the affected key.
2. Create a new key version or rotate the key.
3. Promote the new key version to primary.
4. Verify applications can encrypt with the new primary version and still decrypt data encrypted with older enabled versions.
5. Disable old versions only after dependent services no longer need them.
6. Re-run Cyscale sync and assessment.

CLI example:

```bash
gcloud kms keys versions create --key {{asset.name}} --keyring <key-ring> --location {{asset.region}}
```

Reference: https://cloud.google.com/kms/docs/rotate-key

The control is satisfied when the key is no longer inside the expiring-within-14-days result set.

### Azure

For Azure Key Vault keys, extend the key expiry date or rotate to a new version before the current version expires.

1. Open **Key Vault > Keys** and select the affected key.
2. Review the current key version expiration date.
3. Create a new key version or update the expiration date according to your key lifecycle policy.
4. If the key protects Azure services, verify those services use the current key version or versionless key URI as intended.
5. Keep the previous version enabled until dependent services are validated.
6. Re-run Cyscale sync and assessment.

CLI examples:

```bash
az keyvault key rotate --vault-name <vault-name> --name {{asset.name}}
az keyvault key set-attributes --vault-name <vault-name> --name {{asset.name}} --expires <yyyy-mm-ddThh:mm:ssZ>
```

Reference: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/key-vault/keys/how-to-configure-key-rotation

The control is satisfied when the key no longer expires within the next 14 days.

### Alibaba

For Alibaba Cloud KMS keys, rotate the key material or update the key lifecycle before the expiration date.

1. Open **Key Management Service (KMS)** and select the affected key.
2. Review the key material origin, expiration, and rotation settings.
3. Rotate the key or import replacement key material, depending on the key type.
4. Verify dependent cloud services and applications can use the active key version.
5. Keep old key material available until encrypted data has been migrated or validated.
6. Re-run Cyscale sync and assessment.

Reference: https://www.alibabacloud.com/help/en/kms/key-management-service/

The control is satisfied when the key is no longer reported as expiring within the next 14 days.
